plurals.name: blob_tooltip_minor_explanation
plurals.item: Tap to open and swipe it in the store to collect your Surprise Bag.
Tap to open and swipe them in the store to collect your Surprise Bags.

plurals.name: c2c_v3_Profile_card_active_body_days
plurals.item: Only %1$s%2$d day%3$s left to invite your friends and earn vouchers!
Only %1$s%2$d days%3$s left to invite your friends and earn vouchers!

plurals.name: c2c_v3_Profile_card_active_body_hours
plurals.item: Only %1$s%2$d hour%3$s left to invite your friends and earn vouchers!
Only %1$s%2$d hours%3$s left to invite your friends and earn vouchers!

plurals.name: c2c_v3_invite_friends_header
plurals.item: %1$d day to earn as many vouchers as you can!
%1$d days to earn as many vouchers as you can!

plurals.name: c2c_v3_profile_panel_active_header_days
plurals.item: %1$d day to earn as many vouchers as you can!
%1$d days to earn as many vouchers as you can!

plurals.name: c2c_v3_profile_panel_active_header_hours
plurals.item: %1$d hour to earn as many vouchers as you can!
%1$d hours to earn as many vouchers as you can!

plurals.name: c2c_v3_profile_panel_end_state_earned_body
plurals.item: Thanks to you, one of your friends is rescuing food from going to waste and helping the planet! You can still spread the word. Tap ⚙️ in the top-right corner, then tap 'Invite your friends'.
Thanks to you, %1$d friends are rescuing food from going to waste and helping the planet! You can still spread the word. Tap ⚙️ in the top-right corner, then tap 'Invite your friends'.

plurals.name: charity_home_bottomsheet_welcome_body
plurals.item: Your organisation is partnered with the store below. You'll receive donation offers from this store through the app. Enjoy!
Your organisation is partnered with the stores below. You'll receive donation offers from these stores through the app. Enjoy!

plurals.name: charity_order_inventory_changed_card
plurals.item: There is %1$s update to the inventory.
There are %1$s updates to the inventory.

plurals.name: profile_loyalty_card_close_expire_in_hours_body
plurals.item: Only one hour left to collect %2$d stamps and unlock a voucher.
Only %1$d hours left to collect %2$d stamps and unlock a voucher.

plurals.name: profile_loyalty_card_close_to_expire_in_days_body
plurals.item: Only one day left to collect %2$d stamps and unlock a voucher.
Only %1$d days left to collect %2$d stamps and unlock a voucher.

plurals.name: profile_loyalty_card_multiple_stamps_earned_body
plurals.item: You're only one stamp away from unlocking a voucher!
You're only %1$d stamps away from unlocking a voucher!

plurals.name: profile_new_loyalty_card_expired_body
plurals.item: This offer has ended, but your impact continues. You collected %1$d stamp during this promotion. Great effort!
This offer has ended, but your impact continues. You collected %1$d stamps during this promotion. Great effort!

plurals.name: screen_reader_item_view_rating_overall
plurals.item: Overall experience: Rating %1$s out of maximum 5 stars, based on %2$d recent review
Overall experience: Rating %1$s out of maximum 5 stars, based on %2$d recent reviews
